Title: Prohibits the sale of vape products that are made to be attractive to or target persons under the age of twenty-one
Summary: Prohibits the sale of vape products that are made to be attractive to or target persons under the age of twenty-one or are sold in packaging that is made to be attractive to or target persons under the age of twenty-one.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to prohibiting the sale of vape products that are made to be attractive to or target persons under the age of twenty-one
